languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

languages.text: {n}Несколько раз кивнув сервочерепу, Эоганн говорит:{/n} "Ваша презумпция ошибочна. Нунциус весьма словоохоч и имеет сильное мнение по любой мыслимой теме, которое не стесняется высказывать при первой возможности. К сожалению, вы, будучи мирян{mf|ином|кой}, не способны услышать его пламенные декларации и остроумные замечания. Нунциус категоризирует данный факт как прискорбный".

{n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

{n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

languages.text: {n}Después de asentir varias veces al servocráneo, Eogunn dice:{/n} «Su hipótesis es incorrecta. Nuncius es muy parlanchín y tiene opiniones firmes sobre todos los temas imaginables, y no duda en expresarlos en cuanto tiene oportunidad. Por desgracia, como laic{mf|o|a}, usted no puede escuchar sus declaraciones fervorosas y comentarios ingeniosos. Nuncius categoriza esto como lamentable».
languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

traits.locale_text: {n}Después de asentir varias veces al servocráneo, Eogunn dice:{/n} «Su hipótesis es incorrecta. Nuncius es muy parlanchín y tiene opiniones firmes sobre todos los temas imaginables, y no duda en expresarlos en cuanto tiene oportunidad. Por desgracia, como laic{mf|o|a}, usted no puede escuchar sus declaraciones fervorosas y comentarios ingeniosos. Nuncius categoriza esto como lamentable».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡朝伺服头骨点了几下头，说道：{/n}“您的猜测并不对。努恩修斯其实相当健谈，而且几乎对任何话题都有强烈的看法，一有机会就会毫不犹豫地表达出来。只可惜，作为教外人士，您听不到他那些激烈的观点和机智的评论。努恩修斯认为这一事实令人遗憾。”
languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡朝伺服头骨点了几下头，说道：{/n}“您的猜测并不对。努恩修斯其实相当健谈，而且几乎对任何话题都有强烈的看法，一有机会就会毫不犹豫地表达出来。只可惜，作为教外人士，您听不到他那些激烈的观点和机智的评论。努恩修斯认为这一事实令人遗憾。”

languages.text: {n}Après avoir acquiescé en direction du servocrâne un certain nombre de fois, Eogunn explique :{/n} « Votre supposition est incorrecte. Nuncius est un grand bavard et a un avis tranché sur tous les sujets du monde, qu'il n'hésite pas à exprimer dès que l'occasion se présente. Hélas, en tant que profane, vous n'êtes pas en mesure d'entendre ses déclarations enflammées et ses remarques pleines d'esprit. Nuncius qualifie ce fait de regrettable. »
languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après avoir acquiescé en direction du servocrâne un certain nombre de fois, Eogunn explique :{/n} « Votre supposition est incorrecte. Nuncius est un grand bavard et a un avis tranché sur tous les sujets du monde, qu'il n'hésite pas à exprimer dès que l'occasion se présente. Hélas, en tant que profane, vous n'êtes pas en mesure d'entendre ses déclarations enflammées et ses remarques pleines d'esprit. Nuncius qualifie ce fait de regrettable. »

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er dem Servoschädel mehrere Male zugenickt hat, sagt Eogunn:{/n} "Eure Vermutung ist inkorrekt. Tatsächlich ist Nuncius recht gesprächig und hat zu jedem erdenklichen Thema eine klare Meinung, die er bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zum Ausdruck bringt. Leider sind Laien wie Ihr nicht in der Lage seine feurigen Erklärungen und geistreichen Kommentare zu hören. Nuncius kategorisiert diesen Umstand als bedauerlich."
languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er dem Servoschädel mehrere Male zugenickt hat, sagt Eogunn:{/n} "Eure Vermutung ist inkorrekt. Tatsächlich ist Nuncius recht gesprächig und hat zu jedem erdenklichen Thema eine klare Meinung, die er bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zum Ausdruck bringt. Leider sind Laien wie Ihr nicht in der Lage seine feurigen Erklärungen und geistreichen Kommentare zu hören. Nuncius kategorisiert diesen Umstand als bedauerlich."

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルに何度かうなずいた後、エオガンが言った。{/n}「君の推測は誤りだ。ヌンキウスは実におしゃべりで、考えうるあらゆる話題について強い意見を持ち、機会さえあればためらわずそれを口にする。あいにく、世俗の身である君には、彼の熱烈な宣言や機知に富んだ警句は聞こえない。ヌンキウスはこの事実を遺憾なことと分類している。」
languages.original_text: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

traits.locale_text: {n}サーヴォスカルに何度かうなずいた後、エオガンが言った。{/n}「君の推測は誤りだ。ヌンキウスは実におしゃべりで、考えうるあらゆる話題について強い意見を持ち、機会さえあればためらわずそれを口にする。あいにく、世俗の身である君には、彼の熱烈な宣言や機知に富んだ警句は聞こえない。ヌンキウスはこの事実を遺憾なことと分類している。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, hizmeletin başını birkaç kez salladıktan sonra konuşuyor.{/n} "Varsayımınız yanlış. Nuncius aslında oldukça gevezedir. Akla gelebilecek her konuda güçlü görüşleri vardır ve bunları ifade etmekten asla çekinmez. Ne yazık ki siz avamdan olduğunuzdan onun ateşli beyanlarını ve nükteli sözlerini duyamazsınız. Nuncius, bu gerçeği üzücü olarak nitelendiriyor."

Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."

Akla gelebilecek her konuda güçlü görüşleri vardır ve bunları ifade etmekten asla çekinmez. Ne yazık ki siz avamdan olduğunuzdan onun ateşli beyanlarını ve nükteli sözlerini duyamazsınız. Nuncius, bu gerçeği üzücü olarak nitelendiriyor."
